name: Macquarie Group Limited
description: Macquarie Group Limited is a global financial services organization with Australian heritage, providing clients with asset management, retail and business banking, wealth management, as well as advisory, and risk and capital solutions across debt, equity, financial markets, and commodities. Operating in 30 markets with over 19,100 employees, the group focuses on unlocking capital and ideas to create investment opportunities while facilitating economic activity. Macquarie is known for its specialist expertise in sectors such as renewables, infrastructure, technology, and energy, and maintains a long-standing track record of profitability.
